hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f SESSION_STATE.md ]; then echo "=== Previous Session State ==="; cat SESSION_STATE.md; echo "=== End of Session State ==="; fi'
bash -c 'echo "[PreCompact] Context compaction imminent. Update SESSION_STATE.md with current task status if not already done."'
bash -c 'echo "[SessionEnd] Ensure SESSION_STATE.md reflects current progress for iOS session continuity."'
